queries.question: Which improvised theatres' venue is Cambridge Theatre and which musicals have the same venue?
queries.sql:
SELECT Improvised_Theatres.name
FROM Venues JOIN Improvised_Theatres ON Venues.id = Improvised_Theatres.venueID
WHERE Venues.Name = "Cambridge Theatre"
UNION
SELECT Musicals.name
FROM Venues JOIN Musicals ON Venues.id = Musicals.venueID
WHERE Venues.Name = "Cambridge Theatre"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?venues a :Venue .
    ?improvised_theatres a :Improvised_Theatres .
    ?improvised_theatres p:hasVenues ?venues .
    ?improvised_theatres p:name ?name .
    ?venues p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Cambridge Theatre")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?venues a :Venue .
    ?musicals a :Musicals .
    ?musicals p:hasVenues ?venues .
    ?musicals p:name ?name .
    ?venues p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Cambridge Theatre")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Show improvised theatres and musicals that take place in Cambridge Theatre.
queries.sql:
SELECT Improvised_Theatres.name
FROM Venues JOIN Improvised_Theatres ON Venues.id = Improvised_Theatres.venueID
UNION
SELECT Musicals.name
FROM Venues JOIN Musicals ON Venues.id = Musicals.venueID
WHERE Venues.Name = "Cambridge Theatre"

    ?venues a :Venue .
    ?improvised_theatres a :Improvised_Theatres .
    ?improvised_theatres p:hasVenues ?venues .
